USE rsarkar6;

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS source;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS gene;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS cds;

CREATE TABLE source(
    sourceid INT,
    organism VARCHAR(64)
);

CREATE TABLE gene(
        geneid INT,
        genename VARCHAR(64)
);

CREATE TABLE cds(
        cdsid INT,
        relevantgene VARCHAR(64) NULL,
        productname VARCHAR(64),
        length INT,
        translation TEXT
);
